meta.title: Why Is America Buying The F-15EX & Other Top Stories From The Week
meta.description:
Subscribe and 🔔 to Sandboxx YouTube so you never miss a video. 

It's Saturday, July 25, 2020.  Stay up to date on what's happening in the military with Sandboxx News. 

Here are this week's top stories from Sandboxx News: 

SENATE CONFIRMS FIRST EVER FEMALE COMMANDER OF THE US ARMY RESERVE: GEN. JODY J. DANIELS
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/2CQ8aIC

US NAVY WOULD FACE A MASSIVE 770-SHIP FORCE IN A PACIFIC FIGHT WITH CHINA
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/39rBam1

HERE’S HOW THIS ARMY GENERAL WISHES HE COULD HANDLE INTERNET TROLLS
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/3f1gKl4

YOU CAN MAKE IT THROUGH NAVY SEAL TRAINING IF YOU CAN DO THIS
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/39pVIeL

WHY IS AMERICA BUYING THE F-15EX INSTEAD OF MORE F-35S?
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/2ZZm8Rx

*The appearance of DoD visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.

#F-15EX #NavySeal #NavySealTraining #USNavy #USAirForcec
